typecheck.output: @facturin/api typecheck: Exited with code 0, @facturin/web typecheck: Exited with code 0

blockingIssues.description: Wrong API port hardcoded (3001) in inline use-tenants implementation at line 542. services.yaml defines API on port 3100. All tenant API calls will fail.
Missing routes in root.tsx: ActionMenu navigates to /tenants/:id (Ver) and /tenants/:id/edit (Editar) but these routes don't exist in the router. Only /tenants/:id/configure exists.
EmptyState 'Crear Tenant' button at line 115 has no onClick handler - it renders a button but doesn't navigate anywhere when clicked.

VAL-WEB-032: TestConnectionSection.handleTestConnection is a mock/placeholder using setTimeout to simulate success. It does NOT call any backend endpoint to validate SUNAT connectivity. Comment explicitly states 'This is a placeholder - real implementation would test actual SUNAT connection'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the standard API port configuration (3100 for API, 3101 for web) and mandate use of environment variables for API URLs instead of hardcoded localhost ports. Multiple workers hardcoded port 3001 instead of 3100.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-login-page, web-tenant-list, web-tenant-creation-wizard, web-api-keys-management all have hardcoded 'http://localhost:3001' for API calls. services.yaml correctly defines port 3100.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the expected React Router v7 patterns and required routes for tenant CRUD operations (/tenants/:id, /tenants/:id/edit, /tenants/:id/configure). Workers are creating partial route sets.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-tenant-list ActionMenu uses /tenants/:id and /tenants/:id/edit but only /tenants/:id/configure exists. The frontend skill doesn't specify required routes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that inline styles should not be used when Tailwind CSS is configured. Workers used inline style={{}} objects throughout components instead of Tailwind className.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-login-page, web-tenant-creation-wizard, web-dashboard-layout all use inline styles. Tailwind is configured but not consistently used.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify invocation syntax for agent-browser skill. Workers noted non-standard invocation method.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: web-setup-react-router reviewer noted agent-browser invocation syntax confusion in transcript.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml not found in worker environment
rejectedObservations.reason: The file exists at .factory/services.yaml and was accessible. Worker may have had wrong path. Not a systemic issue.
